response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and cloud engineering experience, with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at Google (MCP). While his AI/GenAI experience is not as deep or explicit as required, his leadership in technical roles, open-source contributions, and cross-domain expertise make him a compelling candidate worth interviewing for further assessment.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and cloud engineering experience at top-tier companies (Google, Meta).
Recent contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (Model Context Protocol) at Google.
Proven leadership in technical roles, including mentoring, workshops, and open-source projects.
concerns: Limited explicit experience with GenAI, RAG architectures, or vector databases in the resume.
No mention of advanced degrees (Master's/PhD) in AI or related fields.
AI-related work is not the primary focus of his recent roles, raising questions about depth of expertise.
